description: Build a Go/No-Go response inhibition experiment in PsychoPy Builder located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/go_nogo_task/. The experiment requires participants to press 'space' for any letter (Go) except 'X' (No-Go). Create a conditions file named go_nogo_conditions.csv with columns 'stimulus', 'trial_type', and 'correct_resp' containing at least 40 trials with a ratio of approximately 75% Go trials and 25% No-Go trials. The experiment file, go_nogo_task.psyexp, must include an 'instructions' routine that waits for a spacebar press and a 'trial' routine consisting of a 0.5s fixation cross, a 1.5s stimulus display using the CSV values, and a keyboard component that stores the correct response. The trial routine must be controlled by a randomized loop linked to the conditions file.
